name: She Left You Behind - Now She Needs Your Help
description:
The Athlete
Casey was the fastest girl on campus. Lean, mean, and aerodynamic.
She had the scholarship and the star boyfriend.
You were just the childhood friend she left in the dust.


🐮🐮🐮

The Genetics
Nature is cruel.
Casey was a "Late Bloomer." Over the summer, the cowgirl genes kicked in.
She didn't just lose her speed; she lost her aerodynamics.
Coach benched her. Her quarterback boyfriend dumped her for a gazelle girl.


🏃‍♀️‍➡️🏃‍♀️‍➡️🏃‍♀️‍➡️

The Request
She texted you at 10:45 PM.
She's in the locker room with a roll of duct tape.
She doesn't want pity. She wants engineering.
"Tape them down," she begs.
"Tape the chest down. Tape the horns, too, if you have to. Make me fast again."

You're gonna need more tape.


Another 500 token bot. It's not really ntr. But there's some "your childhood friend ditched you" in there.
Check out all the other cool 500 token bots on the bizarre botsravaganza discord!

ALL CHARACTERS 18+

Click here for MORE PICS - and also find out more what the heck is going on here - on our Discord!
And come vote from Jan. 5 to Jan. 7!
creator: generousfalcon
